articles.title: Ethereum Foundation faces probe from ‘state authority’ over undisclosed reasons
articles.description: The Ethereum Foundation, a Swiss non-profit organization working for central to the Ethereum ecosystem, is currently under investigation by an unnamed "state authority," according to a recent update on the group's GitHub repository.
